violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceilings and walls in 6th floor kitchen noted in need of repair and cleaning. Vent covers and pipes noted in need of cleaning in the 6th floor kitchen.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Heavy debris build up on fan guards in 6th floor kitchen and in the DC kitchen.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wire shelving noted with chipping paint and rust in the 6th floor kitchen and in the DC kitchen.
CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted being stored above food not to be further cooked. Observed a plate of raw chicken laying in a box of whole tomatoes in 6th floor kitchen walk in cooler.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fan guards in 6th floor kitchen noted to have heavy debris build up. Wire shelving in 1st floor kitchen and 6th floor kitchen noted with debris build up.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Vent covers in DC kitchen noted with heavy debris build up. Ceiling in the 6th floor kitchen noted in need of cleaning along pipes and ventilation ducts.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Clean Food equipment noted stored in an unprotected location. Observed clean utensils and equipment in 1st and 6th floor kitchens being stored on wire shelving with debris build up.
